style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram. A single sheet of paper labelled CLAUDE.md sits at the top of the canvas, with five short numbered lines sketched on it. A clear arrow leads down from the paper into a small set of additional folders labelled SKILLS, HOOKS, STANDARDS, STATE. The paper is clearly the entry point and the rest is read in its context. Hand-drawn lines, navy and rust on warm cream paper. No people, no logos.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram. A single sheet of paper labelled CLAUDE.md sits at the top of the canvas, with five short numbered lines sketched on it. A clear arrow leads down from the paper into a small set of additional folders labelled SKILLS, HOOKS, STANDARDS, STATE. The paper is clearly the entry point and the rest is read in its context. Hand-drawn lines, navy and rust on warm cream paper. No people, no logos.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
